rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 19, 2016, line 8. PLAINTIFF ANDREA STEINER's Motion For Leave To File Fourth Amended Complaint GRANTED. Fourth Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. Motion for summary judgment/adjudication currently set for March 18, 2016 will be moot upon filing of the amended complaint. State Comp. Ins. Fund v. Sup. Ct. (2010) 184 Cal. App. 4th 1124. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANDREA STEINER VS. BAYVIEW LOAN SERVICING, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 19, 2016, line 8. Plaintiff'S Motion To Continue Trial DENIED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID SALMA et al VS. RUBEN DIEGO Q PICARDO et al (Pltfs Challenge Judge Quidachay)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And For Injunctive Relief
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 19, 2016, line 2. PLAINTIFFS DAVID SALMA and MARION ZABORSKI's Motion For Appointment Of Receiver And For Injunctive Relief DENIED. Moving party failed to show that the property "is in danger of being lost, removed, or materially injured" before trial set for April 25, 2016. = (501/REQ)
